creator: jseidel@unixsystem.org
text:
I'm seeing alot of this, the link going up and down, at first I thought it was the cable modem it was attached to, so I purchased a new one and it continues to do it. Also I found a thread from a long time about turning off auto select by hard setting the speed and duplex.

I did this, but still the problem returns.

Mar 12 01:45:55 yoda kernel: re0: <RealTek 8168/8111 B/C/CP/D/DP/E/F PCIe Gigabit Ethernet> port 0xd000-0xd0ff mem 0xd0004000-0xd0004fff,0xd0000000-0xd0003fff irq 17 at device 0.0 on pci4


Mar 12 05:39:43 yoda kernel: re0: link state changed to UP
Mar 12 05:39:47 yoda kernel: re0: link state changed to DOWN

Mar 12 05:40:58 yoda kernel: re0: link state changed to UP

Mar 12 05:41:04 yoda kernel: re0: link state changed to UP
